title: Active State Color Theme for Toolbar Icons
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want toolbar icons to change color when active, so that I can clearly see which functionality (search or filter) is currently enabled.
description: Add active state color changes to toolbar icons like search and filter. Currently, clicking these icons does not change their visual state, making it unclear which functionality is active.
acceptance_criteria: Search icon changes color when active
Filter icon changes color when active
Inactive state returns to the default color
Active state is visually distinct from the default state
ux_changes: Toolbar icons now show an active color state when toggled on, providing clear visual feedback about which functionality is enabled.
comment_summary: Developer updated the icon states and pushed to staging.
